# Plan Your Trip

## Tubing Options and Pricing

![](https://www.coolrivertubing.com/content/userfiles/images/Cool%20River%20Shuttle.jpg)

**TRIP LENGTH:**1 or 2 hour options (short/long ride)

(Trip length can vary with water level)

**When the river is low, we strongly recommend our short ride. It is the best ride available for low water in Helen.**

**PRICE PER TRIP:**

- $14 Monday - Friday
- $16 Saturdays, Sundays, and Holidays
- $12 per person discount on groups of 20 or more when paying together in one group any day of the week. **[More information on groups.](https://coolrivertubing.com/groups)**

FILL OUT WAIVER HERE before buying tickets:  **[online Digital waiver](https://waiver.smartwaiver.com/w/k8bys3eh7hjnvsfw47eerb/web/)**

**HOURS:** 9 a.m. - 6 p.m.

**BUSIEST TIME OF DAY:** 12 p.m. - 3 p.m.

**AGE:** 2+ Years

**THE PRICE INCLUDES:**

1. **Your Tube**
2. **Shuttle Ride**
3. **Life-Jacket**
4. **Tie Straps**
5. **Our Key-Saver Service**

**$5 off Aerial Park at Headwaters Outpost with same day tubing wristband!**

You can purchase tickets online or as a walk-in. If you have a group, please either make a booking online, email **hello@coolrivertubingandadventures.com**, or call us **(706-878-2665)** to make a booking. Please have all waivers completed & know the list of names you’re checking in before arriving at the counter.

[Tickets](https://fareharbor.com/embeds/book/coolrivertubingcompany/?full-items=yes)

We are the only tubing company in Helen offering a shorter tubing trip — perfect if you want a quick ride down the river before grabbing food or shopping.

#### our long ride takes 2 to 2.5 hours.

#### our short ride takes 1 to 1.5 hours.

### IMPORTANT additional INFORMATION:

- We have tubes **with and without bottoms**, we also have tubes **with headrests**. All kid-sized tubes, have bottoms, recommended for ages 12 and under. Each tube accommodates one person **(No double tubes, only singular).** We have connectors for you to enjoy the trip with your group!
- If you feel more comfortable having your kid float down the river with you that is completely okay! You can grab them a tube if you want but it is perfectly okay for them to sit in your lap while you float. Regardless of how many tubes you grab, **everyone floating down the river has to have a wristband!**
- We have push sticks, water shoes, and floatable waterproof pouches available in store for purchase.
- **The group discount applies to groups of twenty or more. You must pay together in one payment. If you have a group of 20 or more, you need a booking on Fareharbor and to have waivers filled out in advance. If you do not want to pay in advance for your group, you can call to make a group booking and we will send you a FareHarbor confirmation link for your group’s waivers.**
- If you need a tube for your pet, it will be at the same cost as the rest of your party. If your pet is small enough to fit in your lap, you do not have to pay for them. **[Things to consider when bringing your pup!](https://coolrivertubing.com/rules-and-safety)**
- Children **must be age 2 or older** to tube with us. If the water level becomes unsafe for our young friends we may need to increase that age limit until the water level returns to its usual depth and current. If you are tubing with pre-schoolers, be sure to check our website or social media pages for any water level restrictions before heading over.
- We accept all major credit and debit cards. We only accept personal checks for large groups. Prices are per person for a single trip. Taxes are not included. Prices are subject to change.

### **Walking Maps / Self-transport options:**

If you do not want to ride the bus, options for self-transport are:

- Walk to the short ride entrance after buying tickets at Chattahoochee Outpost or Mainstreet Booth. In either case, you will be walking about 1.2 miles (22 minutes) total – to the river and to your car.
- Bring two vehicles if planning to do the long ride. Park one at Chattahoochee and all ride another to Headwaters to get in. You can purchase tickets at either outpost.
- To walk to the short ride entrance after purchasing tickets at the Mainstreet Ticket Booth or Chattahoochee Outpost, here are maps to guide you.

![](https://www.coolrivertubing.com/content/userfiles/images/Main%20Street%20Poster-10.jpeg)

[Waiver](https://waiver.smartwaiver.com/w/k8bys3eh7hjnvsfw47eerb/web/) [Waiver](https://waiver.smartwaiver.com/w/k8bys3eh7hjnvsfw47eerb/web/)

![](https://www.coolrivertubing.com/img/phone.svg)
